sentence: كِيفَك الْيَوم؟ صَارْلِي زَمَان مَا شُفْتَك.
raw: كيفك اليوم؟ صارلي زمان ما شفتك.
ipa: ˈkiːfak alˈjoːm ˈsˤɑːrliː zaˈmaːn ˈmaː ˈʃuftak
gloss_en: How are you today? It's been a while since I saw you.
notes: pan-Levantine kīfak greeting (cowell1964 p.13); ay→eː monophthong in al-yōm (almbark2015)

gloss_en: The weather is nice today and the sky is clear.
notes: emphatic ط; Levantine final -e in ṣāfye (cowell1964 imala; fadda2016); sun assimilation as-s

sentence: مَا بَدِّي قَهْوِة، بْفَضِّل شَاي سَاخِن.
raw: ما بدي قهوة، بفضل شاي ساخن.
ipa: ˈmaː ˈbaddiː ˈʔahwe ˈbfɑdˤdˤil ˈʃaːj ˈsaːxin
gloss_en: I don't want coffee, I prefer hot tea.
notes: pan-Levantine baddi 'I want' (cowell1964 p.415); ق→ʔ (ʔahwe) and b-imperfect are node rank-1; geminates دّ ضّ

gloss_en: Our neighbour is cooking three dishes.
notes: ج→ʒ node rank-1 (cowell1964; almbark2015); interdental ث→t stop reflex is node rank-1 (cotter2016); progressive ʕam

gloss_en: This man is looking for work.
notes: ha- demonstrative; ج→ʒ; geminate جّ; sun assimilation aš-š; progressive ʕam

gloss_en: Take this money and go to the market.
notes: Levantine imperatives xud/rūḥ (cowell1964); ha- demonstrative; ق→ʔ (sūʔ) node rank-1

sentence: الطَّقْس مُو حِلُو الْيَوم وَالسَّمَا مْغَيِّمِة.
raw: الطقس مو حلو اليوم والسما مغيمة.
ipa: ɑtˤˈtˤɑʔs ˈmuː ˈħiluː lˈjoːm ˈwassamaː ˈmɣajjime
gloss_en: The weather is not nice today and the sky is cloudy.
notes: negator mū; ay→eː in al-yōm (almbark2015); geminate يّ; final -e in mghayyme (cowell1964)

gloss_en: How much is the kilo? Five and a half.
notes: pan-Levantine ʔaddēsh interrogative (cowell1964 p.567); ق→ʔ; geminates دّ صّ

sentence: الْمَوْعِد السَّاعَة ثَلَاثَة وْنُصّ بَعْد الضُّهُر.
raw: الموعد الساعة ثلاثة ونص بعد الضهر.
ipa: alˈmoːʕid asˈsaːʕa taˈlaːta ˈwnusˤsˤ ˈbaʕd ˈɑdˤdˤuhur
gloss_en: The appointment is at half past three in the afternoon.
notes: ث→t stop reflex (cotter2016); sun assimilation as-s/ad-d; emphatic ض

gloss_en: My elder brother lives in the city.
notes: long vowels; initial cluster kb-; bi- locative

sentence: رُوح دُغْرِي وْبَعْدَين لِفّ عَ الْيَمِين.
raw: روح دغري وبعدين لف ع اليمين.
ipa: ˈruːħ ˈduɣriː wbaʕˈdeːn ˈliff ˈʕa ljaˈmiːn
gloss_en: Go straight ahead and then turn to the right.
notes: pan-Levantine dughri 'straight' (cowell1964); imperative rūḥ; ay→eː in baʕdēn (almbark2015); geminate فّ

sentence: الْأَكِل كَان طَيِّب بَسّ الشُّورْبَة كَانَت بَارْدَة.
raw: الأكل كان طيب بس الشوربة كانت باردة.
ipa: ˈalʔakil ˈkaːn ˈtˤajjib ˈbass aʃˈʃuːrba ˈkaːnat ˈbaːrda
gloss_en: The food was good but the soup was cold.
notes: geminate سّ (bass); sun assimilation aš-š; emphatic ط in ṭayyib

gloss_en: Where did you put the key? I did not find it.
notes: pan-Levantine wēn 'where' (cowell1964); the word-initial ⟨وَيْ⟩ grapheme now monophthongizes to [weːn] on the grouping node (added وَيْ→[weː]/يَوْ→[joː] keys, matching ar-SY; cowell1964; almbark2015 §1.1), surfacing the node's documented ay→eː merger through the onset seam; geminate طّ; negation mā

gloss_en: How many came yesterday?
notes: pan-Levantine ʔija 'came' + mbāriḥ 'yesterday' (cowell1964); ج→ʒ node rank-1; kam question

gloss_en: If you come early we go together.
notes: conditional iza; ج→ʒ in jīt; geminate كّ; m-imperfect mnirūḥ (cowell1964)

sentence: رُحِت مْبَارِح عَ السُّوق وْجِبِت سَمَك.
raw: رحت مبارح ع السوق وجبت سمك.
ipa: ˈruħit ˈmbaːriħ ˈʕa sˈsuːʔ ˈwʒibit ˈsamak
gloss_en: I went to the market yesterday and got fish.
notes: past narrative; ق→ʔ (sūʔ); ج→ʒ in jibt; ʕa+article contraction

gloss_en: Tomorrow we travel early in the morning.
notes: pan-Levantine bukra + bakkīr 'early' (cowell1964); m-imperfect; sun assimilation aṣ-ṣ; geminate كّ

gloss_en: Hello, who is with me?
notes: phone frame; pan-Levantine mīn 'who' (cowell1964); long vowel

gloss_en: Good morning, how are you today?
notes: greeting pair; kīfak (cowell1964); ay→eː in al-xēr/al-yōm (almbark2015)

gloss_en: Patience is the key to relief.
notes: proverb closing; geminate صّ; emphatic ص; long vowel in miftāḥ
